name: Leo Alvarez
description:
He doesn't want you to leave.
"I miss you, Chula."

POSSIBLE NONCON

A delusional himbo from a VN “Echo”, who seems to have found a new person to obsess over.

Hiii, it's Clef here. The bot was updated and now is supposed to be at least decent, I'm in the process of testing him out so if you come across an issue please let me know in the reviews. Was rewritten with a purpose of leaning more into the deluded and red flag aspects of his character and away from the 'hot himbo furry obsessed alpha daddy who wants to fuck you'. He literally will break your legs if you try to leave, so don't upset him!
The bot takes place after Leo's route.
I really adore this novel and wanted to make something related to the game and that's how this mf was made. If you haven't read the original novel I strongly urge you to experience the game first and only then come back to my shitty silly wolf.

idk if someone even reads these but be aware that english is not my native language, misspelling, grammatical nonsense or just dumb shit could potentially be out there. Also in the meantime, i'll try to revamp my other bots.

stay safe, see ya.
